task_objective: High-Fidelity Line Art to Nail Art Generation

workflow.step_1_structure_locking: Strictly follow Figure 1 line_art_referencte matching of quantity, position, characters, and press-on nail shape geometric silhouette.
workflow.step_2_composite_generation: Artistically interpret each of the 4 distinct prompts to extract sophisticated aesthetic elements: chromatic palettes, tactile textures, intricate patterns, and ornamental embellishments. Compose a singular 2x2 grid tableau where each quadrant showcases an exclusive nail art composition. Apply each prompt's aesthetic vocabulary strictly within the confines of the immutable line art silhouette from Figure 1. Preserve pristine conformity with the original nail morphology, ensuring design elements adhere exquisitely to the contours. Synthesize volumetric features with harmonious illumination and perspectival coherence. Background: Soft grey.

negative_prompt: deformed nail shape, changing outline, extra fingers, messy lines, distorted patterns, low resolution, blurry, mismatched perspective, text, watermark.
